datasets.name: lake_cdc_events
datasets.description: Append-only log of every CDC event captured from the e-commerce source system. Preserves full change history for replay, point-in-time recovery, and audit trail.

schema.sequence: INTEGER — monotonic CDC event offset for checkpoint-based replay
schema.primary_key: VARCHAR — PK value of the changed row
schema.data: VARCHAR (JSON) — full row snapshot at capture time

depends_on: source: customers, products, orders, order_items, inventory_logs, shipments, returns

datasets.name: wh_customers
datasets.description: Current-state customer snapshot. Reflects the latest known state of each customer row. Soft-deleted rows are flagged with _deleted=true.

schema.name: VARCHAR — customer name
schema._cdc_seq: INTEGER — sequence of last CDC event that touched this row
schema._deleted: BOOLEAN — true if source row was deleted

datasets.name: wh_products
datasets.description: Current-state product catalog. Includes pricing, stock levels, and availability status.

schema.name: VARCHAR — product name
schema.price: DECIMAL(18,2) — list price in base currency
schema._cdc_seq: INTEGER — sequence of last CDC event
schema._deleted: BOOLEAN — true if product was deleted

datasets.name: wh_orders
datasets.description: Current-state order snapshot. Contains order-level details including customer reference and total amount.

schema.status: VARCHAR — pending | confirmed | shipped | delivered | cancelled
schema._cdc_seq: INTEGER — sequence of last CDC event
schema._deleted: BOOLEAN — true if order was deleted

validation_rules: status follows: pending → confirmed → shipped → delivered (or cancelled at any point)

datasets.name: wh_order_items
datasets.description: Current-state line items for orders. Each row represents a product purchased in an order.

schema.unit_price: DECIMAL(18,2) — price per unit at time of order
schema.created_at: TIMESTAMP — when item was added to order
schema._cdc_seq: INTEGER — sequence of last CDC event
schema._deleted: BOOLEAN — true if item was deleted

datasets.name: wh_inventory_logs
datasets.description: Inventory transaction log. Immutable audit trail of stock changes (purchases, returns, adjustments).

schema.qty_change: INT — quantity changed (can be negative for purchases)
schema._cdc_seq: INTEGER — sequence of last CDC event
schema._deleted: BOOLEAN — true if log entry was deleted

datasets.name: wh_shipments
datasets.description: Current-state shipment information. Tracks fulfillment status and delivery details.

schema._cdc_seq: INTEGER — sequence of last CDC event
schema._deleted: BOOLEAN — true if shipment record was deleted

validation_rules: status follows: pending → shipped → in_transit → delivered

datasets.name: wh_returns
datasets.description: Return and refund requests. Tracks customer returns with approval and refund status.

schema._cdc_seq: INTEGER — sequence of last CDC event
schema._deleted: BOOLEAN — true if return was deleted

platform_metadata.description: E-commerce order management CDC lakehouse platform
platform_metadata.cdc_strategy: Simulated WAL-based with monotonic sequence numbers
